CustomField.description: If the "Required to Send Cert K After Cert?" field on the property's development is "Yes", enter the date the Certificate K was sent to the development.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the "Required to Send Cert K After Cert?" field on the property's development is "Yes", enter the date the Certificate K was sent to the development.
CustomField.label: Date Cert K Sent to Development
